title: TNTime
description: Shows how long until a TNT explodes!
body: # Archived! Use [TNT Countdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/tntcountdown) instead! # TNTTime Shows how long until a TNT explodes! This mod renders a timer over primed TNT to let you know how long until it explodes, similar to Sk1er's original mod for 1.8.9. This mod should also work on most servers, even those that use a custom TNT explosion time, such as Hypixel Bed Wars! The mod can be toggled on and off via the config. ![The timer working on Hypixel Bed Wars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16670eb6f942bdb7a8fef013dbacb0ee9235f95e.png)
